notes.title: ROM-free by design
notes.body: This twin ships the route, splits, and input logic only. The runner supplies their own legally-obtained cartridge dump.

notes.title: Brock-skip philosophy
notes.body: Early route optimizes for the first gym wall: minimum viable levels, maximum walked-past encounters.

notes.title: Buffer discipline
notes.body: A frame saved in every menu is minutes saved across a full run. Buffer relentlessly.
